content.content:
1	name: CI autotools
2	
3	on:
4	  push:
5	  pull_request:
6	
7	defaults:
8	  run:
9	    shell: bash
10	
11	jobs:
12	  build-and-test:
13	    name: ${{ matrix.name }}
14	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
15	
16	    strategy:
17	      # When set to true, GitHub cancels
18	      # all in-progress jobs if any matrix job fails.
19	      fail-fast: false
20	
21	      matrix:
22	
23	        include:
24	          - name: linux-gcc-intree
25	            os: ubuntu-latest
26	
27	          - name: linux-gcc-ootree
28	            os: ubuntu-latest
29	
30	          # macOS
31	          - name: macos-clang-intree
32	            os: macos-latest
33	
34	          - name: macos-clang-ootree
35	            os: macos-latest
36	
37	    steps:
38	      - name: Checkout Code
39	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
40	
41	      - name: Setup apt cache (Linux)
42	        if: startsWith(runner.os, 'Linux')
43	        uses: actions/cache@v5
44	        with:
45	          path: /var/cache/apt
46	          key: ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
47	          restore-keys: |
48	            ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-${{ matrix.os }}-
49	            ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-
50	
51	      - name: Setup Common Prerequisites
52	        run: |
53	          case ${{ runner.os }} in
54	            Linux*)
55	              sudo apt update
56	              sudo apt install autoconf automake libtool bison
57	              ;;
58	            macOS*)
59	              sudo xcode-select -switch /Applications/Xcode.app
60	              echo "SDKROOT=$(xcodebuild -version -sdk macosx Path)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
61	              echo "$(xcodebuild -version -sdk macosx Path)" >> $GITHUB_PATH
62	
63	              brew install autoconf automake libtool bison coreutils
64	              # bison is not activated by default to avoid clobbering
65	              # already present outdated system bison. Let's prepend
66	              # brew's path.
67	              echo "$(brew --prefix bison)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
68	              ;;
69	          esac
70	
71	      - name: Setup Python
72	        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
73	        with:
74	          python-version: 3.x
75	          architecture: x64
76	
77	      - name: Install Python Dependencies
78	        run: |
79	          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
80	          python -m pip install docutils pygments
81	
82	      - name: Generate ./configure
83	        run: ./autogen.sh
84	
85	      - name: Fast Configure
86	        run: |
87	          ./configure \
88	              --disable-dlang \
89	              --disable-golang \
90	              --disable-haskell \
91	              --disable-java \
92	              --disable-js \
93	              --disable-ocaml \
94	              --disable-python \
95	              --disable-rust \
96	              --disable-swift \
97	              --disable-vlang \
98	              --disable-zig \
99	              --prefix=$PWD/install
100	
101	      - name: Fast Build
102	        run: make -j$(nproc)
103	
104	      - name: Fast Install
105	        run: make -j$(nproc) install
106	
107	      - name: Fast Clean
108	        run: make -j$(nproc) distclean
109	
110	      - name: Minimal Install Test
111	        working-directory: ./install/bin
112	        run: ./re2c --version
113	
114	      - name: Get build dir
115	        id: build-info
116	        run: |
117	          if echo "${{ matrix.name }}" | grep -q "ootree"; then
118	            BUILD_DIR="$(pwd)/.build/${{ matrix.name }}-full"
119	            mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
120	          else
121	            BUILD_DIR="$(pwd)"
122	          fi
123	          echo "BUILD_DIR=$BUILD_DIR" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
124	
125	      - name: Full Configure
126	        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
127	        run: |
128	          $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/configure \
129	              --prefix=$PWD/full-install \
130	              --enable-libs \
131	              --enable-parsers \
132	              --enable-lexers \
133	              --enable-docs \
134	              --enable-debug \
135	              RE2C_FOR_BUILD=$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/install/bin/re2c
136	
137	      - name: Full Build
138	        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
139	        run: |
140	          find $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/src -name '*.re' | xargs touch
141	          make -j$(nproc)
142	
143	      - name: Run Main Test Suite
144	        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
145	        run: bash -c "ulimit -s 256; make check -j$(nproc)"
146	
147	      - name: Run Skeleton Tests
148	        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
149	        run: python run_tests.py --skeleton
150	
151	      - name: Full Install
152	        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
153	        run: make -j$(nproc) install

file.content:
name: CI autotools

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

defaults:
  run:
    shell: bash

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: ${{ matrix.name }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}

    strategy:
      # When set to true, GitHub cancels
      # all in-progress jobs if any matrix job fails.
      fail-fast: false

      matrix:

        include:
          - name: linux-gcc-intree
            os: ubuntu-latest

          - name: linux-gcc-ootree
            os: ubuntu-latest

          # macOS
          - name: macos-clang-intree
            os: macos-latest

          - name: macos-clang-ootree
            os: macos-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Setup apt cache (Linux)
        if: startsWith(runner.os, 'Linux')
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: /var/cache/apt
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-${{ matrix.os }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-apt-cache-

      - name: Setup Common Prerequisites
        run: |
          case ${{ runner.os }} in
            Linux*)
              sudo apt update
              sudo apt install autoconf automake libtool bison
              ;;
            macOS*)
              sudo xcode-select -switch /Applications/Xcode.app
              echo "SDKROOT=$(xcodebuild -version -sdk macosx Path)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
              echo "$(xcodebuild -version -sdk macosx Path)" >> $GITHUB_PATH

              brew install autoconf automake libtool bison coreutils
              # bison is not activated by default to avoid clobbering
              # already present outdated system bison. Let's prepend
              # brew's path.
              echo "$(brew --prefix bison)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
              ;;
          esac

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
        with:
          python-version: 3.x
          architecture: x64

      - name: Install Python Dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install docutils pygments

      - name: Generate ./configure
        run: ./autogen.sh

      - name: Fast Configure
        run: |
          ./configure \
              --disable-dlang \
              --disable-golang \
              --disable-haskell \
              --disable-java \
              --disable-js \
              --disable-ocaml \
              --disable-python \
              --disable-rust \
              --disable-swift \
              --disable-vlang \
              --disable-zig \
              --prefix=$PWD/install

      - name: Fast Build
        run: make -j$(nproc)

      - name: Fast Install
        run: make -j$(nproc) install

      - name: Fast Clean
        run: make -j$(nproc) distclean

      - name: Minimal Install Test
        working-directory: ./install/bin
        run: ./re2c --version

      - name: Get build dir
        id: build-info
        run: |
          if echo "${{ matrix.name }}" | grep -q "ootree"; then
            BUILD_DIR="$(pwd)/.build/${{ matrix.name }}-full"
            mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
          else
            BUILD_DIR="$(pwd)"
          fi
          echo "BUILD_DIR=$BUILD_DIR" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Full Configure
        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
        run: |
          $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/configure \
              --prefix=$PWD/full-install \
              --enable-libs \
              --enable-parsers \
              --enable-lexers \
              --enable-docs \
              --enable-debug \
              RE2C_FOR_BUILD=$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/install/bin/re2c

      - name: Full Build
        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
        run: |
          find $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/src -name '*.re' | xargs touch
          make -j$(nproc)

      - name: Run Main Test Suite
        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
        run: bash -c "ulimit -s 256; make check -j$(nproc)"

      - name: Run Skeleton Tests
        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
        run: python run_tests.py --skeleton

      - name: Full Install
        working-directory: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}
        run: make -j$(nproc) install

      - name: Archive test artifacts
        # Run this step only if tests failed (otherwise there is nothing to upload).
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          # To ensure that jobs don't overwrite existing artifacts,
          # use a different name per job.
          name: test-${{ matrix.name }}
          # Tests run in a temporary directory that has a name test_<timestamp>.
          path: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.BUILD_DIR }}/test_[0-9]*
          # Artifacts are retained for 90 days by default.
          # In fact, we don't need such long period.
          retention-days: 30
